title: Garfield Mod
description: Adds Garfield as a hungry, whining boss fight – beat him and claim your well-earned lasagna!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db6c0dec9b3e3b0971446b689404bae8fd7b7125.png)

# Features
Have you ever thought: “Minecraft is fun, but what it really needs is a grumpy, constantly hungry cat that complains and tries to kill me”?
No?
Too late.

With this mod, Garfield spawns into your world – and he’s mad. Really mad.
He whines, he’s always hungry, and if you don’t leave him alone, he’ll happily beat you up.

To make things better, there’s also Nermal.
Nermal doesn’t really do anything… except exist so Garfield has a reason to show up. Poor guy.

Defeat Garfield and you’ll be handsomely rewarded:
 He drops Lasagna. The one true endgame item.

#  Inspiration
This mod was inspired by Fundy’s hilarious Garfield Mod.
